hooks.command: file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}"; case "$file" in */memory/*|*/.claude/projects/*/memory*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not write to auto-memory. Persist to git-versioned files instead (skills, knowledge, CLAUDE.md). See No Auto-Memory section in CLAUDE.md.'; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}"; case "$file" in */CLAUDE.md|*/AGENTS.md|*/OPENCODE.md) echo 'SYNC REQUIRED: You just edited a synced file. CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and OPENCODE.md must be identical. Update the other two files now.';; esac; exit 0
